title: Introduce DevOps Dojo: Create efficiencies that support your business
summary: Start your DevOps Dojo journey.  Create multidisciplinary DevOps teams by using shared tools and processes that are designed to make your organization’s software development and implementation projects more efficient.

sections.title: Introduce DevOps Dojo: Create efficiencies that support your business
sections.summary: Start your DevOps Dojo journey.  Create multidisciplinary DevOps teams by using shared tools and processes that are designed to make your organization’s software development and implementation projects more efficient.

lessons.title: Introduce the foundation pillars of DevOps: Culture and Lean Product
lessons.content_md:
DevOps is the union of people, process, and products to enable continuous delivery of value to our end users. Discover the first two foundation pillars of DevOps: Culture and Lean Product.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduce-foundation-pillars-devops/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduce the foundation pillars of DevOps: Culture and Lean Product

lessons.title: Define the foundation pillars of DevOps: Architecture and Technology
lessons.content_md:
There are three things required to make DevOps happen: the cultural component, tools and technology, and architecture. Discover the last two foundation pillars of DevOps, Architecture and Technology!

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/define-foundation-pillars/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Define the foundation pillars of DevOps: Architecture and Technology

lessons.title: Analyze DevOps Continuous Planning and Continuous Integration
lessons.content_md:
Explore the first two capabilities in the DevOps taxonomy, Continuous Planning and Continuous Integration.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/analyze-devops-continuous-planning-intergration/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Analyze DevOps Continuous Planning and Continuous Integration

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Introduce DevOps Dojo: Create efficiencies that support your business
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Introduce DevOps Dojo: Create efficiencies that support your business**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
